data.title: The Big Liberation Day Surprise
data.description: Enterprising investors and traders are going to have an opportunity to make a lot of money over the next year or two.

data.title: FDA Rejects Aldeyra's Reproxalap For Dry Eye Disease Again, Citing Efficacy Concerns
data.description: The FDA rejected Aldeyra's resubmission for reproxalap, citing efficacy concerns. The company plans another trial and aims to resubmit the NDA by mid-2025.

data.title: GE Vernova's Gas Turbines Fuel Data Center Project In Pennsylvania: Details
data.description: GE Vernova Inc. plans to supply 7 high-efficiency gas turbines capable of running on hydrogen to repurpose a former coal-fired power plant into a natural gas-powered data center campus, providing economic and environmental benefits.

data.title: Exxon Mobil Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
State Street's Strategic Investment in Ethic Aims to Revolutionize Personalized Portfolios
data.description: State Street Corporation (NYSE: STT) shares down premarket on Thursday as State Street Global Advisors announces strategic partnership and investment in Ethic Inc.
